description: Produce a ChronicleOS local demo run with seeded memory and artifacts

sources.title: Task brief
sources.content: Produce a ChronicleOS local demo run with seeded memory and artifacts

sources.title: Workflow approach
sources.content: Use the live dashboard to submit the task, wait for the agents to complete, and review the returned outputs.

sources.title: Verification step
sources.content: Open history, memory, and artifact pages to confirm the persisted results are visible.

summary: ChronicleOS should produce a chronicleos local demo run with seeded memory and artifacts; start by using the dashboard task launcher, then inspect the persisted memory and artifact outputs after the workflow completes.
